Tests that WebMCP toolautosubmit attribute changes are tracked.
Enabling WebMCP...
Tool added: declarative_tool, autosubmit=false
Adding toolautosubmit attribute...
Tool removed: declarative_tool
Tool added: declarative_tool, autosubmit=true
Removing toolautosubmit attribute...
Tool removed: declarative_tool
Tool added: declarative_tool, autosubmit=false
